creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
Try the patch at [1] for diagnostic purposes, for some reason
configure appears to believe that gettext works without -lintl.  This
makes that part unconditionally fail; if it works it appears upstream
has made a mistake with his configure.in-foo.

Chris

[1] http://www.bayofrum.net/~crees/patches/vim-test-lintl.diff
